passages.passage_text: In this type of questions, a statement/statements is/are given followed by some conclusions. Choose the conclusion which follows the given statement. Directions (Example Nos. 9-13) Which of the conclusions can be drawn from the statement.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Statement: Many business offices located in buildings having two to eight floors. If a building has more than three floors, it has a lift.

choices.a: All floors may be reached by lifts
choices.b: Only floors above the third floor have lifts
choices.d: Second floors do not have lifts

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Statement: All guilty politicians were arrested. Ranjan and Kamlesh were among those arrested.

choices.c: Ranjan and Kamlesh were not politicians

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Statement: All the students in my class are intelligent. Kaushik is not intelligent.

choices.c: Kaushik is not a student of my class
choices.d: All other than Kaushik are intelligent

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Statements: A. Karan Johar is a good director. B. Directors are intelligent.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Statement: Most of the mobile phones in that shop are costly.

choices.a: Some of the mobile phones in that shop are costly
choices.b: Mobile phone of brand X are costly in that shop
choices.c: None of the mobile phones in that shop is cheap
choices.d: Some of the mobile phones in that shop are cheap

solutions.solution: None of the conclusions follows. 'Animals live on oxygen' does not imply that animals do not need oxygen.
Any written piece is recognised as song when it is sung by a singer. Therefore, only Conclusion I follows.
Neither of the conclusions follows. A room may look beautiful with other decorative items.
None of the conclusions is correct.
Neither of the conclusions follows from the given statement.
The domestic demand of crude oil should be decreased.
It is clear from the given statement.
It is clear from the given statement.
As all the students in my class are intelligent and Kaushik is not intelligent, so Kaushik is not a student of my class.
As directors are intelligent and Karan Johar is good director, so Karan Joahar is intelligent.
From the given statement, the conclusion 'some of the mobile phones in that shop are cheap' follows.
